title: Discrete-Time Sinusoid cos (Ωn + θ)
summary: This page defines the general discrete-time sinusoid C cos(Ωn + θ), explains amplitude, phase, and frequency in radians per sample and cycles per sample, and relates frequency to the period N0. It also notes that cos(Ωn + θ) and cos(−Ωn + θ) have the same frequency magnitude, illustrates the concept with Figure 3.11, and begins a new discussion on how sampling a continuous-time sinusoid produces a discrete-time sinusoid.
